calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Disclaimer Of Life Interests, Terminating Trust And Distributing Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Accepting Disclaimer Of Life Interests, Terminating Trust And Distributing Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Sep-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda McCall for Alfred Saroni, Jr.

Ms. McCall stated that her Client wishes to give up any interest he may have in the Trust and that he makes an irrevocable renunciation of any interest. In addition, she stated that there are four Grandsons, that three of them are adults, that the three adult Grandsons have the exact same interest as the Minor Grandson, that all were noticed, that two of the adult Grandsons gave consents, and that her Client wants to see the money go down to the Children during his lifetime. The Court stated that it did not have consents from all three adult Grandsons and that it wanted to see a Guardian Ad Litem appointed for the minor Child. The matter was continued to September 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Accepting Disclaimer Of Life Interests, Terminating Trust And Distributing Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Continued To Aug-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
